Classes.Name: ScaleMapObj
Classes.Notes: An object that can vary in scale with many settings.

Obj_arg0.Name: Minimum Scale
Obj_arg0.Description: Specifies the lower bound for the scale. The value is divided by 1000 in the calculation. Default is 1000.

Obj_arg1.Name: Maximum Scale
Obj_arg1.Description: Specifies the upper bound for the scale. The value is divided by 1000 in the calculation. Default is 1100.

Obj_arg2.Name: Wait Delay
Obj_arg2.Description: The time in frames it scales again. Default is 120.

Obj_arg3.Name: Small Up Time
Obj_arg3.Description: The time in frames it takes for it to reach the maximum scale. Default is 240.

Obj_arg4.Name: Scale Down Time
Obj_arg4.Description: The time in frames it takes for it to reach the minimum scale. Default is 240.

Obj_arg5.Name: Initial State
Obj_arg5.Description: Specifies its initial nerve state. Default is 0.

Obj_arg6.Name: Scale Once?
Obj_arg6.Description: If set, it will only scale once.

SW_A.Description: If used, it will only change its size while this switch is activated.

SW_B.Description: If used, it will only change its size while this switch is not activated.
